docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSOCIATED BUILDERS
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-10-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-26-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,016.27 FILED BY ASSOCIATED BUILDERS AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
